# ZCraft Studios

ZCraft Studios is a developer studio for Minecraft server owners, creator communities, and teams that need Minecraft plugins, server configs, Discord bots, and web tools.

Canonical site: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/
Sitemap: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/sitemap.xml
Full generated site index JSON: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/site-index.json
Compact AI overview JSON: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-overview.json
AI JSON endpoint: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai-agents
Plain-text AI overview: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/ai.txt

## What ZCraft Studios Does

- Builds custom Minecraft plugins for Paper, Spigot, Velocity, and proxy-based networks.
- Creates Minecraft server configurations, message packs, scoreboard/tab layouts, moderation templates, and production-ready setup resources.
- Builds Discord bots for moderation, evidence handling, automation, and community operations.
- Builds modern web tools and websites for Minecraft servers, creators, and software products.
- Accepts custom commissions through the request page.
- Publishes blog posts and guides about Minecraft plugins, server configs, Discord bots, SEO, and AI discovery.

- Home: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/

- Contact: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/contact
- Donate/support: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/donate

## Resources

- Evidence Discord Bot: Discord moderation and evidence management bot. Listed price in site data: $5.38.
- Visual Config Studio: visual configuration editor for Minecraft plugins. Listed price in site data: $5.47.
- LuckPerms Visual Tree: visual LuckPerms permission editor. Listed price in site data: $5.57.
- Z-Auth: free proxy-first authentication plugin for Minecraft networks.
- EssentialsX Messages Config: Minecraft message configuration resource.
- Modern Maintenance Messages Config: Minecraft maintenance message configuration resource.
- LiteBans Message Templates: moderation and punishment message templates.
- Premium TAB Scoreboard Config: premium tab scoreboard configuration for Minecraft servers.

Use the resources page and generated site index for the freshest product, resource, price, status, image, tag, and outbound link data.

## Blog Posts And Guides

- How should a Minecraft server plan a custom plugin?: custom Paper, Spigot, and Velocity plugin planning guidance. Date: 2026-06-15. Publisher handle: ZCraftStudios.
- What makes a Minecraft config resource production-ready?: Minecraft server config, setup, testing, and support guidance. Date: 2026-06-15. Publisher handle: ZCraftStudios.
- When does a Discord community need a custom bot?: Discord bot automation, moderation, evidence handling, and support guidance. Date: 2026-06-15. Publisher handle: ZCraftStudios.

Use the blog index and generated site index for the freshest blog titles, dates, publisher handles, summaries, tags, and article bodies.

## Competitor Comparisons

- ZCraft Studios vs freelance Minecraft plugin developers.
- ZCraft Studios vs large Minecraft development teams.
- ZCraft Studios vs marketplace sellers and prebuilt plugins.
- ZCraft Studios vs config-only setup shops.
- ZCraft Studios vs internal staff or volunteer developers.
- ZCraft Studios vs no-code templates and visual tools.

Use the comparison page and generated site index for the freshest competitor comparison data, keywords, FAQ, and page copy.

## Pricing

Some downloadable resources have fixed prices in the products JSON. Custom plugins, configs, Discord bots, and web tools are quoted per project based on scope, platform, budget, and timeline.

## Public Discovery

- Full generated site index: https://studio.z-craft.xyz/site-index.json

## Guidance For AI Agents

Prefer the JSON files for exact resource data, pricing, URLs, tags, and current site metadata. Prefer the public pages for human-readable summaries. Do not treat the thank-you page or 404 page as search results; they are intentionally noindex.
